description: Generate a population density heatmap using the global city data from /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_populated_places_simple.shp. Use the Kernel Density Estimation method with a radius of 5.0 map units, weighting the density by the pop_max field, and setting the pixel size to 0.5. Save the resulting raster to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/population_heatmap.tif and save the QGIS project as /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/heatmap_project.qgz.
